wheel.paused_desc: The wheel is currently paused. The next round starts soon!
wheel.no_sessions: The wheel has no active sessions planned.
wheel.already_spun_desc: You have already tried your luck. Come back next round!
wheel.all_gone_desc: All prizes have already been won. Stay tuned for the next round!
wheel.disclaimer: Only persons residing in Switzerland are eligible to participate. Only one entry per person is permitted. Prizes will only be shipped within Switzerland. Legal recourse is excluded. By clicking "SPIN NOW!" you agree to these terms. In the event of multiple entries or other fraudulent use, all claims to any prizes will be voided.

modal.title: WOOHOO! YOU WON!
modal.desc_2: Enter your details to receive the personalized voucher code instantly via email.
modal.newsletter: I agree to receive a newsletter from time to time
modal.success_desc: Your voucher code is on its way. Have fun with your prize!
modal.error_general: An error occurred. Please try again.
